creator: guru@unixarea.de
text:
after 'portsnap fetch update' and 'portupgrade --batch -a' the port sysutils/xvidcap failes to build with:

main.o(.text+0x14e8): In function `main':
/usr/ports/sysutils/xvidcap/work/xvidcap-1.1.4p1/src/main.c:937:
undefined reference to `av_free_static'
gmake[2]: *** [xvidcap] Error 1

How-To-Repeat: just with 'make' in /usr/ports/sysutils/xvidcap
